## Gerald Baker Financial Group Purchases 161,056 Walmart Shares

Routine 13F-style disclosure with no thesis implication for Walmart. No action warranted.

- Gerald Baker Financial Group LLC acquired 161,056 shares of Walmart (WMT).
- Routine institutional purchase disclosure; no investment rationale or price provided.
- Share count is the sole specific detail disclosed in the headline.
